note: Phase-1 supply-chain pin for the codebase-memory-mcp binary. Empty sha256 => tools/cbm/fetch_cbm.py --verify REFUSES, so indexing stays disabled by default. To adopt: (1) clone `repo`, checkout an audited `ref`, build `binary_rel`, inspect it; (2) `python tools/cbm/fetch_cbm.py --init <binary>` to record `ref` + `sha256`; (3) wire per docs/06-Roadmap/codebase-memory-mcp-phase1-plan.md. canClaimAGI:false.
